block_00: Take a look at the top news of the week
block_03: Ethereum, the second-largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization, is trading at $1,680, up by 4.5% in the last 24 hours. The cryptocurrency has been experiencing gains over the past few days, along with major digital assets – Bitcoin. Market analysts remain optimistic about the overall cryptocurrency market as more institutional investors are starting to embrace digital assets.
block_07: The company said on Wednesday that it would increase wide-body production to meet demand, a move that could help the European plane maker win market share from Boeing Co. The share price has risen by 9% this week.
block_10: Lyft's recent $1 billion investment from Alphabet has caused its stock to fall, as investors worry that the company is overvalued. Alphabet's investment gives it a stake of about 10 percent in Lyft. The share price has fallen by 33% in one week.
